pages.title: Seven focal slots
pages.text: $(bold)Slot 0:$(warn) Jar of Blood — only blood jars accepted.$(br)$(bold)Slot 1:$(warn) Soul jar catalyst opposite blood.$(br)$(bold)Slots 2-6:$(warn) Head, Torso, Legs, Right Arm, Left Arm — filters reject misplaced anatomy.

pages.title: Why duplicates matter
pages.text: Arm items tagged $(italic)ArmLeft$(warn) accept either lateral slot — adapters overload metadata like Botania flowers sharing textures.
